ab: Siwkayen ho ko tireng iso.
Si Caki kako, Moetepay to ko mihecaan ako.
en: My name is Caki, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: Cima ko ngangan no miso?
Si Caki ko ngangan no mako.
O maan ko finacadan no miso?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: O wawa no ’Amis kako.
Saheto o Yencomin ko paro no loma’ namo haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Hai, saheto o ’Amis ko paro no loma’ niyam.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是阿美族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Amis.

ab: Saheto o ’Amis ko paro no loma’ iso haw?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Cowa, o wama ako i, o ’Amis; o ina ako i, o Payrang.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是阿美族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Amis, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: Nima a wawa kiso?
O wawa ni Mayaw Lahok kako.
O ama iso kora haw? Pinaay to ko mihecaan nira?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Enem polo’ ko mihecaan nira.
O ama iso kora haw? Pinaay to ko mihecaan nira?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Cowa, o kalas no niyaro’ cira, falo polo’ to ko mihecaan nira.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: Pina to ko mihecaan no kaka iso to fa’inayan?
Moetep ira ko falo ko mihecaan no kaka ako.
Adihayay ko kaikaka no mihecaan no kaka iso tisowanan haw?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: Lima a mihecaan ko kalala’ed no mihecaan niyam.
Hakowaay ko ’akawang iso?
Cecay so’ot ira ko sepat polo’ a kongfen ko ’akawang ako.
Halafin to caay kasaso’araw, ’akawangay to kiso haw?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: Hai, Cecay so’ot ira ko tolo polo’ ko ’akawang ako.
Maso^soay kiso haw?
Cowa, mararaway ko pinengneng iso.
Mangiliway kiso haw?
Cowa, maso^soay kako.
Maso^soay kiso haw?
Hai, tolo polo’ to ko tingting ako.
